commands.description: Victory! Ascend to the next floor.
Defeat! Drop back and trigger mutation/marks.
Show changes from the latest defeat.
List unclaimed survivor marks on current floor.
Claim a survivor mark by its ID.
Consume one or more Ash Potions from inventory.
Deduct one or more repair materials from inventory.
Resolve a deterministic bounded combat stub for the current floor.
Attempt bounded traversal advance using traversal pressure and existing MVP outcome pipeline.
Attempt bounded retreat/escape using traversal pressure and existing MVP outcome pipeline.
